page_metadata.biotools__summary: SDPpred is a tool for predicting which residues of a protein determine functional differences relative to its homologues.  It takes as input an multiple sequence alignment of a protein family divided into groups based on the perceived functional differences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SDPpred is a tool for predicting which residues of a protein determine functional differences relative to its homologues.  It takes as input an multiple sequence alignment of a protein family divided into groups based on the perceived functional differences.
